mapper.select: SELECT P.PROM_ID, P.PROM_TITLE, P.PROM_DETAIL, P.CREATE_DATE, P.VIEWS, P.STATUS, E.MAIN_IMG_PATH, EA.WEBSITE, U.NICKNAME AS NICKNAME FROM EVENT_PROMOTION P JOIN EVENT E ON P.EVENT_ID = E.EVENT_ID JOIN EVENT_APPLICATION EA ON E.APP_ID = EA.APP_ID JOIN "USER" U ON EA.USER_NO = U.USER_NO ORDER BY P.CREATE_DATE DESC OFFSET #{pi.offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{pi.limit} ROWS ONLY

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM EVENT_PROMOTION P JOIN EVENT E ON P.EVENT_ID = E.EVENT_ID JOIN EVENT_APPLICATION EA ON E.APP_ID = EA.APP_ID JOIN "USER" U ON EA.USER_NO = U.USER_NO WHERE P.PROM_TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'

SELECT P.PROM_ID, P.PROM_TITLE, P.PROM_DETAIL, P.CREATE_DATE, P.VIEWS, P.STATUS, E.MAIN_IMG_PATH, EA.WEBSITE, U.NICKNAME AS NICKNAME FROM EVENT_PROMOTION P JOIN EVENT E ON P.EVENT_ID = E.EVENT_ID JOIN EVENT_APPLICATION EA ON E.APP_ID = EA.APP_ID JOIN "USER" U ON EA.USER_NO = U.USER_NO WHERE P.PROM_TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' ORDER BY P.CREATE_DATE DESC OFFSET #{pi.offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{pi.limit} ROWS ONLY

SELECT P.PROM_ID, P.PROM_TITLE, P.PROM_DETAIL, P.CREATE_DATE, P.VIEWS, P.STATUS, E.MAIN_IMG_PATH, EA.WEBSITE, CASE WHEN EA.STAT_CODE = 'A' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS IS_PROMOTED, U.NICKNAME AS NICKNAME FROM EVENT_PROMOTION P JOIN EVENT E ON P.EVENT_ID = E.EVENT_ID JOIN EVENT_APPLICATION EA ON E.APP_ID = EA.APP_ID JOIN "USER" U ON EA.USER_NO = U.USER_NO WHERE P.PROM_ID = #{promoNo}
